buildCommand: npx expo export && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let h=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8');if(!h.includes('manifest.json')){h=h.replace('</head>','<link rel=\"manifest\" href=\"/manifest.json\"><meta name=\"theme-color\" content=\"#208AEF\"><meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-capable\" content=\"yes\"><meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style\" content=\"default\"><link rel=\"apple-touch-icon\" href=\"/icon-512.png\"></head>');fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h)}"
